# FR Digital

FR Digital is a local SEO consultancy based in Bolingbrook, Illinois, run by Ryan. FR Digital helps Chicagoland service businesses, including Bolingbrook, Plainfield, Naperville, Aurora, and Joliet, get found on Google through technical SEO, local optimization, and content strategy.

## Services
- Technical SEO: site audits, crawlability, indexation, Core Web Vitals, structured data fixes
- On-Page SEO: keyword strategy, content optimization, internal linking, metadata
- Local SEO: Google Business Profile optimization, citations, review strategy
- Content & Strategy: search-driven content plans targeting high-intent keywords
- Link Building: white-hat link acquisition and local citations
- Reporting: transparent monthly reporting tied to rankings, traffic, and leads

## Proof
A recent campaign for Pulse Auto Care, a Plainfield auto repair shop, grew Google market share for their core keyword from about 16% to about 30% within 90 days, on a keyword with roughly 110,000 monthly searches.
